welcome.heading: Welcome to Import
welcome.intro: Load an existing CSV file to import your family tree data. New people will be added to the existing family tree.

info.heading: What do you need to know about the import?
info.line1: The file must have the correct column names. Use the CSV template as a starting point.
info.line2: Comma, semicolon and tab are automatically recognised as column separators.
info.line3: Existing people will not be overwritten, new rows will be added.
info.line4: Your data never leaves your browser: everything is processed locally.
